description: Verso: Unidentified document in Arabic script, maybe some sort of account. There are four distinct entries, which have a large word in the right margin, maybe the name of a person: Najm(?), a ghulām; Khayr(?); Nājī(?). Mentions a divorce (فطلقه الرجل) in l3. Needs examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
